why: CHART: 45-min consolidation at 7534.5 resolved UP — 10:30/10:35 candles broke to fresh day high 7545.36, 100% of range, momentum flipped +0.15%/+0.14%. Clean breakout, buy the break. GEX CONFIRM: negative-gamma regime (-37M) = breakouts extend not fade; no pika ceiling overhead, barney magnet at 7560 (king -14M) 15pts up pulls price toward it as target; pika floor 7500 below. Chart+GEX agree = long.

Thesis degraded on BOTH legs: (1) 5-min momentum stalled to -0.00%, breakout not following through, price pinned at day highs. (2) GEX confirmation GONE — the 7560 barney magnet I targeted vanished; near-spot re-formed as pika +15M at 7585, a positive-gamma PIN/wall that caps upside not a magnet. Structure that justified entry no longer exists + overhead resistance hardened. Take the breakeven, stand down, wait for cleaner setup.

CHART: 3rd failed breakout at the 7548-7556 range top (10:40, 11:10, now). Price faded 7556->7552->7548, 5-min momentum negative, rolling over. Range-day play: fade the poke at the top back to the middle, entering near resistance not chasing. GEX CONFIRM: barney strengthening into KING at 7550 (-23M) capping right overhead = classic short trigger; net gamma -36M (levels break) means a move down accelerates. Target VWAP 7538 then cover into rising pika floor 7520. Chart+GEX agree = short.

Short INVALIDATED: price reclaimed the 7550 barney (now 7551.3, above my stop line) and 5-min momentum flipped +0.07%. My fade-the-failed-breakout thesis required price to hold below 7550 and head to VWAP; instead it bounced back through resistance with no downside follow-through. Range day whipsaw. Take the small loss per plan, do not marry it.

CHART: selloff 7550->7528 EXHAUSTED at strong support; 8-min base built at 7528-30 right above floor, down-momentum decayed -0.23%->-0.10%, 5-min flat. Buy the support hold at range low (mean-revert day). GEX CONFIRM (the differentiator): regime FLIPPED to POSITIVE-gamma +12M = levels HOLD (my 2 losers were negative-gamma levels-break chop); KING pika floor 7520 (+21M) directly beneath as strong support; no pika ceiling capping bounce, only 7550 barney above = my target. Chart+GEX strongly agree = long. Stop: close below 7518. Target VWAP 7539 then 7550.

Support read was RIGHT — price held the 7528 base ~17min, 7520 pika floor caught it exactly (positive-gamma levels-hold confirmed). But the tradeable BOUNCE to VWAP never started; price dead-pinned flat at 7530, momentum flat, net gamma now neutral 0M, and the pin magnet (7520 pika) sits BELOW me. A 0DTE long in a flat pin is theta decay with no upside progress. Take the breakeven, dont marry a non-progressing trade, wait for a real momentum trigger.
